settings.subheading: Effective date: March 2026 | Last updated: March 2026

settings.content:
Introduction

At BoltElectronics, we are dedicated to providing a secure and transparent digital shopping environment. This Privacy Policy outlines how we manage your data when you interact with our technology storefront and services.

Information We Collect

To process your tech orders, we collect the following:

  • Full names, email addresses, and phone numbers
  • Shipping and billing addresses
  • Payment details (handled by secure third-party gateways)

We also automatically collect technical data including device information, browser type, and IP addresses to optimize site performance.

How We Use Your Information

Your data is used strictly for the following purposes:

  • Fulfilling orders and delivering your gadgets
  • Providing after-sales support and warranty services
  • Sending updates on new technology drops and sales
  • Improving our storefront through analytics

Data Sharing

We share data with trusted partners essential to our operations, such as payment processors, logistics companies, and technical support teams. We never sell your data to independent third-party marketers.

Information Security

BoltElectronics implements industry-standard encryption and security protocols to protect your sensitive information. We continuously monitor our infrastructure for potential vulnerabilities.

We retain data only as long as necessary for fulfillment, warranty history, and legal compliance.

Cookie Policy

We use cookies to maintain your shopping cart, analyze traffic patterns, and personalize your experience. You can manage cookie permissions directly through your browser settings.

Your Choices and Rights

You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. If you wish to manage your stored information or close your account, please contact our support team.

Children's Privacy

Our storefront is not designed for users under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect data from children.

Policy Updates

We may update this policy as we evolve. Significant changes will be posted here with an updated effective date.

Contact Us

For any privacy-related questions, please reach out to our dedicated legal team via the Contact page or our customer support hotline.
